name: Apache Dubbo
description: High-performance Java/Go RPC framework originated at Alibaba, powering microservices across Chinese tech stack.

seo.title: Apache Dubbo — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Apache Dubbo: High-performance Java/Go RPC framework originated at Alibaba, powering microservices across Chinese tech stack.

when_to_use: Java microservices RPC framework for Spring Cloud apps
Service registry and discovery for distributed systems
Traffic routing and load balancing for Alibaba-stack
Cross-language service calls between Java and Go
Migrate monolith to microservices with Dubbo mesh

review.verdict: Dubbo remains a powerhouse in Chinese tech stacks, but Western teams usually default to gRPC.
review.best_for: Java microservice teams needing mature governance and Alibaba-proven scale
review.not_for: Western teams starting fresh where gRPC has better tooling and community
